projectDescription: A cognitive layer for Claude that tracks epistemic weight during working sessions — surfacing when unvalidated hypotheses, model priors, or AI-generated proposals are silently becoming decisions.
keyFeatures: Epistemic weight tracking across five source classes (OP, EXT, AI, MP, DSK)
Five weight states (Spark, Candidate, Tracked, Crystallized, Rejected) with transversal flags
Cognitive checkpoint (dogana) that fires at ten defined threshold crossings
Surface snapshot format for orientation moments and phase changes
Anti-recency rule preventing conversational inertia from masquerading as decisions
Pre-write gate to prevent unvetted AI/MP/EXT material from entering structural artifacts
Decontamination pass to strip conversational residue from persistent output
Compact inline tagging ([AI], [MP], [EXT], [DSK], [~]) for minimal-friction weight annotation
Three-level checkpoint intensity from silent tracking to hard stop
Custom instruction anchor that forces full-read behavior in Claude Desktop
publicApiSurface: CUSTOM_INSTRUCTION.txt (custom instruction anchor for Instructions for Claude)
SKILL.md — full operating frame (verbatim read required)
references/frame.md — compact reminder, read at session start and on drift risk
references/dogana.md — checkpoint checklist, read when a threshold fires
references/snapshot.md — surface snapshot format, emitted on surface triggers
Source classes: OP, EXT, AI, MP, DSK
Weight states: Spark, Candidate, Tracked, Crystallized, Rejected
Transversal flags: Quarantined, Contaminated, Needs verification

Threshold vocabulary: proposal→premise, premise→constraint, constraint→decision, decision→artifact, draft→spec, provisional phrase→naming, local compromise→architecture, AI/MP/EXT→implicit OP, factual hypothesis→technical foundation
